dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes entering after trend confirmation rather than anticipating reversals. Entry requires: (1) price crossing the 10-period MA in direction of trend, and (2) minimum 2 bars of movement in that direction (enforced by requiring price beyond previous close). Exit occurs when price reverses back through the MA, indicating trend shift. Direction is context-dependent as the signal applies to both uptrends and downtrends.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes entering after trend confirmation rather than anticipating reversals. Entry requires: (1) price crossing the 10-period MA in direction of trend, and (2) minimum 2 bars of movement in that direction (enforced by requiring price beyond previous close). Exit occurs when price reverses back through the MA, indicating trend shift. Direction is context-dependent as the signal applies to both uptrends and downtrends.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter a position only after the trend has already shifted and begun moving in the desired direction, not in anticipation of a trend change.
